channel.title: World Bank Group Job Vacancies
channel.description: List of vacancies at the World Bank Group

item.title: Senior Portfolio Manager, Hedge Funds
item.description: World Bank Group has a vacancy for the position of Senior Portfolio Manager, Hedge Funds Location: Washington, DC.
